---
description: 'AITuber project C# coding rules – namespaces, WS protocol, Growth system'
applyTo: 'AITuber/Assets/Scripts/**/*.cs'
---

# AITuber C# 実装ルール

> WS拡張パターン・Growth System 詳細は Aegis を参照。

- Namespace: `AITuber.Avatar` / `AITuber.Growth` / `AITuber.Room`
- Runtime: `AITuber.Runtime` asmdef (`autoReferenced: true`)
- Editor: `Assembly-CSharp-Editor` (asmdef なし)
